creator: khera@onceler.kciLink.com
text:
plugger fails to build from the ports collection.

Fix: 

I think I need some sort of compat libs, but I don't know which ones, nor from where to get them.  I have the 2.2 a.out compat package installed.

I can't install the pre-packaged plugger package, since it wipes out
my existing netscape-communicator-4.74 install and sticks
netscape-navigator 4.73 in its place.  Otherwise that's what I'd use ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	
dcd /usr/ports/www/plugger
make

it fails as follows.

===>  Building for plugger-3.2
make plugger.so CC=gcc XCFLAGS='-fpic -aout' LD=gcc XLDFLAGS='-shared -aout'
gcc -c -O -I../PluginSDK30b5/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -DXP_UNIX -DSTREAMER -DVERSION=\"3.2\"  -DDEBUG -fpic -aout -o plugger.o plugger.c
gcc -c -O -I../PluginSDK30b5/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -DXP_UNIX -DSTREAMER -DVERSION=\"3.2\"  -DDEBUG -fpic -aout -o common.o ../PluginSDK30b5/common/npunix.c
gcc -shared -aout -o plugger.so plugger.o common.o
ld: c++rt0.o: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/www/plugger/work/plugger-3.2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/www/plugger/work/plugger-3.2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/www/plugger.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/www/plugger.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /u/onceler1/usr/ports/www/plugger.
